item.title: S-EST11223: RAAF Edinburgh Road Upgrade, SA
item.description: RAAF Edinburgh Road Upgrade

item.title: PROC-9177400: Proof of Concept Funding - Call 1 2026
item.description:
GRDC’s purpose is to invest in research, development and extension that creates enduring profitability for Australian grain growers. To help deliver on its purpose GRDC seeks proposal for funding to support early-stage innovations that have the potential to create value for Australian grains growers and require proof of concept studies to demonstrate their feasibility and applicability to the industry.

Funding will support key early-stage research and development activities that will provide critical information to demonstrate the feasibility of the concept or innovation or support cross industry/discipline technology translation activities of existing research and development from adjacent industries. This is an open, competitive process and not all applicants may be awarded funding.

To participate in this process, applicants must be seeking funding that is no more than $250,000.00 excluding GST, with a minimum of 1:1 leveraged funding of financial commitments or in-kind equivalent. Research must align to the research and development priorities of the Australian grains industry identified in the GRDC RD&E Plan 2023-28. Proof of concept activities and milestones, including reporting, must be completely within 18 months of commencement.

item.title: 10032196: Norfolk Island Child and Family Wellbeing Services 2026
item.description: The Australian Government Department of Infrastructure, Transport, Regional Development, Communications, Sport and the Arts wish to procure services for an organisation to lead and deliver child and family wellbeing services on Norfolk Island.

item.title: RFT 04-2026: Provision of catering, accommodation, reception and booking system services - Pinkenba
item.description:
The AFP requires a range of services to be delivered at the 2 sites in Pinkenba, including:

   a.         catering services including catering, external catering, bar service and coffee services

   b.         accommodation and housekeeping services for circa 160 rooms

   c.         reception and booking system services

item.title: 25/1513/01: Risk Assurance Advisory Services – 65MP Project
item.description: The Bank is seeking a Line 2 risk assurance advisory vendor capable of providing independent, senior?level strategic, construction, development and commercial governance advisory services to support the successful delivery of the 65 Martin Place Program.

item.title: GA2026/872: Ore geometry data compilation
item.description: Compile data on the pre-mining geometry of ore bodies across different mineral systems

item.title: HOMEAFFAIRS/2199/RFT: FOR ACQUISITION OF AND SUSTAINMENT OF NEW FUMIGANT DETECTION AND IDENTIFICATION EQUIPMENT
item.description: The Department is seeking to refresh its fleet of fumigant detection and identification (FDI) equipment used by the Australian Border Force (ABF) in the process of examining the contents of shipping containers at its Container Examination Facilities (CEFs) around Australia. The equipment will be used to ascertain if there are fumigants, volatile organic compounds (VOC) or toxic industrial chemicals (TIC) present at unsafe levels.

item.title: JSD/RFT/74800/1: Land Command, Control, Communications and Compute (C4) Panel for Services
item.description: The Commonwealth requires a range of technical specialist services to support the continued evolution and modernisation of the LC4 capability system and seeks to establish a Standing Offer Panel for Services

item.title: 10018855: Deliver the National Justice Reinvestment Unit
item.description: The objectives of the National Justice Reinvestment Unit (NJRU) are to support and build capability for up to 30 Commonwealth- funded justice reinvestment initiatives.

item.title: DFAT-1085: Humanitarian Deployable Power Restoration Capability
item.description: Humanitarian Deployable Power Restoration Capability

item.title: ATM_2025_5550: The Great Barrier Reef Traditional Owner Led Water Quality Improvement Program
item.description:
This approach to market is seeking to engage a single contractor with relevant and appropriate expertise to: 

- establish and support each of the Traditional Owner–Led Reef Water Quality Advisory Group and Traditional Owner–Led Reef Water Quality Working Group; 

- provide advice and recommendations to assist the design of Phase Two; and 

- provide advice and assistance to potential grant applicants with grant application guidance and support for Phase Two.

item.title: 26ACMA085: Mail Security Screening Services
item.description: The Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) is seeking a qualified supplier to deliver secure mail screening and tactile examination services for inward postal mail addressed to ACMA offices in Canberra, Sydney, and Melbourne.

item.description: The Australian Criminal Intelligence Commission (ACIC) is seeking to engage a service provider to undertake Drug and Alcohol testing at ACIC state offices.

item.title: PROC 7725 Revised: Revised- Security Guarding Services and Alarm Monitoring
item.description: Revised - Security Guarding Services and Alarm Monitoring

item.title: GA2025/2754: Kinetic Pyrolyser System
item.description: GA is seeking Supplier/s to provide a modern kinetic pyrolyser system capable of conducting both source rock evaluation and kinetic pyrolysis across a diverse range of geological materials, including cores, cuttings, recent sediments, and oil asphaltenes. The system must also provide enhanced functionality to support GA’s expanding mineral research objectives under the Resourcing Australia's Prosperity initiative.

item.title: DPS26000205: Conservation Services – Parliament House Art Collections
item.description: The Department of Parliamentary Services (DPS) is seeking to engage a suitably qualified and experienced supplier to provide specialist conservation services to support the management and preservation of the Parliament House Art Collections. Services include environmental and materials analysis, conservation advice, documentation review, specialist training, and annual environmental and condition reporting for high profile collection items, including the 1297 inspeximus issue of the Magna Carta.

item.title: NMAT2526/09: Request for Expressions of Interest – Long-term Lease of Storage Premises in Mitchell, ACT
item.description:
The National Museum of Australia (NMA) is a Commonwealth corporate entity established under the National Museum of Australia Act 1980 (Cth).

The NMA is seeking expressions of interest from interested parties willing to enter into a long-term lease for the provision of a suitable storage premises for the storage of collection items.  The storage premises will be located in the industrial area of Mitchell, ACT.

item.title: 10032547: Creative and Digital Communication services
item.description: This Approach to Market (ATM) is for the provision of strategic brand and communication services; graphic design services; authoring and editorial services; digital communication services; film and video services; still photography services

item.description: To establish contract for fire alarm monitoring services - Defence sites Victoria

item.title: DFAT 1091: Primary Health Care for Papua New Guinea (PHC4PNG)
item.description: This investment supports Papua New Guinea (PNG) to strengthen integrated primary health care - partifularly in rural and remote areas by  improving provincial governance, financing, and service delivery to achieve better health outcomes aligned with the National Health Plan 2021–2030.

item.title: PSC002818: Provision of Nuclear Medicine Facility Process Design & Design Integration and Process Design Peer Review
item.description:
The Australian Nuclear Science and Technology Organisation (ANSTO) is seeking submissions as part of an Approach to Market (ATM) for the provision of Nuclear Medicine Facility:

  • Process Design & Design Integration and;
  • Process Design Peer Review as part of its overarching Nuclear Medicine Manufacturing Program (NMMP).

item.description: Provision of financial accounting, budget management, and taxation management services

item.description: The Office of Parliamentary Counsel (OPC) is seeking submissions to establish a contract with a single supplier for the provision of Content Manager licensing, maintenance, support and associated services for its on?premises Content Manager environment.

item.title: DHA-PROC26/572: Expression of Interest - Furnishings, Storage, Logistics and Associated Services
item.description:
DHA has a requirement to fully furnish multiple properties in our portfolio. This includes provision of goods, necessary logistics, temporary storage, and inventory management in between furniture usage.  

 DHA are seeking suppliers capable of delivering the following goods and services: 

1.      Providing furniture, electrical items and homewares (the furnishings).

2.      Providing associated services including delivery, assembly and staging of furnishings and inventory management and stock control (the services).

3.      Provision of logistic and storage services including packing, collection, storage and re-delivery (logistics and storage) for some of the furnishings.

Collectively, all elements are referred to as the requirement.

Upon registration and Deed of Confidentiality execution, an Information Pack can be provided to Respondents with further details.

item.title: PSC002845: RFI for a Self-Service Contract Management System (CMS)
item.description:
ANSTO is a corporate Commonwealth entity and Australia’s nuclear research and technology organisation. ANSTO is responsible for delivering specialised advice, scientific services and products to government, industry, academia and other research organisations. It is our mission to deliver knowledge, value and trust through the application of nuclear science, technology and engineering.

ANSTO has a fully implemented contract management system that has been in place for circa 5 years.  ANSTO seeks to review what is available in the market to determine its planning for a software-as-a-service solution (ie not a bespoke build) contract management system in future years and to understand the technology options available.

ANSTO seeks information regarding suitably qualified and experienced Suppliers of, and their plan to deliver, a contract management system that meets the requirements ANSTO has currently identified below (the System).

 

The details sought for the System are comprised of:

a)    Details on functionality and capacity, and options for implementation (including data migration capability) and information on data hosting, security and management, including cyber security, by reference to the requirements set out below;

b)    Indicative pricing for an off the shelf product; and

c)     Additional information about the Supplier.

These can be provided by completing Part B and the table in this Part C.

This is not an approach to market at this stage.  This is a request for information to gather information about what is available, and a mechanism for ANSTO to understand suitable contract management systems available for a corporate Commonwealth entity in Australia.

If you choose not to respond to this request, you may still respond to any future open approach to market by ANSTO for a contract management system.  Please be aware that ANSTO may use information provided in this RFI including to inform future planning including development of requirements in a future approach to market (which may change from this RFI) and budgeting, and as otherwise outlined in Part D of this RFI.

item.title: ASCA EDT P2ISR RFP: 82130 Advanced Strategic Capabilities Accelerator Emerging and Disruptive Technologies P2ISR Request for Proposal
item.description: Request for Proposal for EDT Projects for Persistent and Pervasive Intelligence Surveillance and Reconnaissance

item.title: DPS26000682: Broadcast cameras, lenses and associated camera control infrastructure
item.description:
The Department of Parliamentary Services (DPS) Broadcasting Services team requires a fleet of cameras, lenses and camera control systems, including:

  • Ultra-High Definition (UHD)(4K) EFP camera lenses
  • EFP broadcast camera backs which provide Ultra-High Definition (UHD)(4K) capability
  • ENG cameras with lenses for truly portable scenarios
  • Modern broadcasting camera control system and supporting infrastructure.

item.title: MGF_17: Supply of Medical Grade Footwear to eligible persons
item.description:
NOTE: existing suppliers need not reapply

The Medical Grade Footwear (MGF) Programme is an important part of DVA’s health care arrangements and is part of the Rehabilitation Appliance Programme (RAP).  The MGF Programme provides a nation-wide access to a wide range of MGF and related services for entitled persons.

item.title: CNS16: Department of Veterans' Affairs Community Nursing Services Invitation
item.description: Department of Veterans' Affairs invites interested suppliers of Community Nursing Services to apply to provide these services from 1 July 2016.

item.description: Demo ATM to test eLodgement and download

item.title: DPC-2017: Invitation to provide Day Procedure Centre Services to the Veteran Community
item.description: The Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA) is seeking to contract with eligible stand-alone private day hospitals (referred to as Day Procedure Centres or DPCs) to provide DPC services for DVA Entitled Persons across Australia from 1 October 2017 onwards.

item.title: PHS-16: Private Hospital Services
item.description: DVA is seeking the provision of Private Hospital services for Entitled Persons by publishing this Invitation to Provide Private Hospital Services to the Veteran Community.
